wrapped.response: Math is discovered through a harmonious alignment of empirical evidence and logical coherence, revealing its existence as a fundamental aspect of the world, akin to gravity or the speed of light. This convergence of evidence and logic underscores the objectivity of mathematical truths, existing independently of human thought. However, this perspective is also complemented by the idea that mathematics can be seen as a language we use to describe reality, an invention that allows us to convey mean
